title:
HSNO application register - all application types
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## HSNO application register - all application types
Requesting API for list of all applications from the EPA's HSNO application register. CSV and/or JSON format of "entire register" register with the following content for each application: 
- Application overview
- Application code:
- Application type:
- Applicant:
- Application state:
- Application decision:
- Application purpose:
- Decision notified date:
- Application documents
- Substance Name:
- Decision:
- Synonyms:
- Approval number:
- Trade names:
- Approval status:
- Approval expiry date:
- Application superseded by:
Operational Efficiency - Eliminate manual review and search of applications decided by EPA to find decision and approval documents - Enable real-time data synchronisation, reducing administrative overhead - Enhanced Compliance & Risk Management to ensure approved substances adhere to relevant conditions based on approval documents Provide automated monitoring of changes to our company's substance approvals - Enable immediate alerts for updates to approval conditions and regulatory decisions - Reduce compliance risk through proactive tracking rather than reactive discovery Improved Data Analytics - Overcome current limitations for manual review and searching of register to determine relevant approvals and decisions - Enable seamless connection to dynamic analysis tools (Excel, Power BI, etc.) - Support automated reporting of approvals and changes

#### Likely Source Agency
Environmental Protection Authority
2
								
									Subscribers
